method: First-pass commercial targeting model using public London housing and development signals plus UCM service fit. Scores are directional and should be refined with ad data, Search Console, GBP, quote requests and CRM outcomes.

sources.name: GLA London Opportunity Areas
sources.note: Opportunity Areas typically have capacity for at least 2,500 new homes or 5,000 jobs.

sources.name: London Datastore Opportunity Areas
sources.note: Opportunity Areas are major brownfield land sources for housing, commercial and other development.

sources.name: Trust for London housing completions
sources.note: Tower Hamlets, Brent and Newham had the most completions across 2020/21-2022/23.

sources.name: Trust for London housing tenure
sources.note: 30.1% of London households were privately rented in the 2021 Census.

sources.name: Trust for London rent affordability
sources.note: Average one-bed rent is 52% of London median pre-tax pay; inner London is least affordable.

zones.zone: Canary Wharf / Isle of Dogs / South Poplar
zones.segment: High-density flats, offices, finance workers, managed buildings
zones.campaignAngle: AI-assisted cleaning plans for busy apartment blocks and offices: faster quoting, smarter scheduling, less admin waste.
zones.cta: Request a managed building or office cleaning quote

zones.zone: Royal Docks / Canning Town / Stratford / Newham growth belt
zones.segment: New homes, regeneration zones, renters, landlords, property managers
zones.campaignAngle: New-build and rental turnover cleaning with AI-assisted scheduling to keep handovers moving.
zones.cta: Book a new-build or tenancy turnover clean

zones.segment: New completions, build-to-rent, mixed-use development, family renters
zones.campaignAngle: Cleaner shared spaces and faster tenant turnaround for growing residential developments.
zones.cta: Request a block or landlord cleaning plan

zones.segment: High-value flats, professionals, renters, offices, hospitality
zones.campaignAngle: Premium cleaning support for time-poor professionals and managed buildings.
zones.cta: Get a tailored London cleaning quote

zones.zone: Canada Water / Elephant and Castle / Old Kent Road
zones.segment: Regeneration, dense apartments, commercial space, young professionals
zones.campaignAngle: Smart cleaning and maintenance support for fast-changing London neighbourhoods.
zones.cta: Request cleaning support for your building

zones.segment: Riverside new builds, renters, landlords, young families
zones.campaignAngle: AI-assisted scheduling for landlords and property managers handling tenant turnover.
zones.cta: Book an end-of-tenancy or property care quote

zones.segment: Large borough, housing growth, renters, offices, landlords
zones.campaignAngle: Economical cleaning and maintenance support for landlords and local businesses.
zones.cta: Ask for a cost-efficient cleaning plan

zones.zone: Old Oak / Park Royal / Ealing-Hounslow corridor
zones.campaignAngle: One supplier for cleaning and maintenance across commercial and mixed-use sites.
zones.cta: Request a commercial cleaning and maintenance quote

zones.segment: High rents, premium homes, offices, hospitality, strict standards
zones.campaignAngle: High-standard cleaning with faster quote handling and clear service scopes.

zones.segment: Outer London families, new homes, affordability-sensitive households
zones.campaignAngle: Economical cleaning packages for households and landlords who need predictable costs.
zones.cta: Ask for an economical cleaning quote
